author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: .design/phase-10-pytorch-parity.md — 18 requirements, 18 acceptance criteria, 4-wave parallelism plan, 3 new crates. Covers einsum, hooks, distributions, higher-order gradients, FlashAttention, profiler, sparse tensors, FFT, full linalg, vmap, pack_padded_sequence, autocast wiring, TensorBoard, model hub, GGUF, PagedAttention, special functions, gradient penalty.
